name: Oakland County
summary: Oakland County runs the courts, deeds, elections support, public health, and other services that reach every town within it.

bodies.name: Board of Commissioners
bodies.cadence: Meets about twice a month at the county complex in Pontiac.
bodies.role: Sets the county budget and county policy. Each of its 19 members represents one district.
bodies.note: Each town falls within one or more county commissioner districts.

bodies.name: Office of the County Executive
bodies.role: Runs the county's day-to-day departments and proposes the county budget.

bodies.name: Clerk and Register of Deeds
bodies.role: Keeps county records, including property deeds, and helps run elections.

bodies.name: Office of the Treasurer
bodies.role: Collects county taxes and handles unpaid property taxes across the county.

bodies.name: Office of the Prosecuting Attorney
bodies.role: Brings criminal cases on behalf of the county.

bodies.name: Office of the Sheriff
bodies.role: Runs county law enforcement and the county jail. Some towns contract with the Sheriff for local policing.

bodies.name: Office of the Water Resources Commissioner
bodies.role: Oversees drains, sewers, and stormwater that cross town lines across the county.

bodies.name: Oakland County Health Division
bodies.cadence: Open year-round, with clinics at county health centers.
bodies.location: Oakland County health centers, Pontiac and Southfield
bodies.role: Provides public health services to every town: immunizations, water and food safety, and health records.

bodies.name: 6th Circuit Court and county courts
bodies.cadence: In session year-round at the county courthouse.
bodies.role: Hears the felony, civil, and family cases that come from towns across the county.
bodies.note: District courts handle smaller matters closer to home and are organized by area.

officials.name: David Coulter
officials.note: Became County Executive in 2019, then elected in 2020 and 2024.

officials.name: Board chair (sample entry)
officials.note: Sample content. The board elects its own chair from among its members. The current chair is not verified here yet.
